events.text:
>
{"decision": "needs_more_info", "risk": "medium", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": [], "percent_complete": 85, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.4, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["No progress photos or field observations were provided to verify panelboard installation, makeup, working clearances, or neutral conductor termination compliance."], "actions": ["Provide the progress photos and any inspection notes so the panelboard condition can be evaluated against NEC Art. 408, 110.26, and 200.4."], "rationale": "The scenario states progress photos exist but none were supplied. Without visual evidence of the panelboard, conductors, terminations, working clearances, and labeling, a pass/fail determination cannot be made. The stated stage of rough-complete and absence of flagged defects only indicate the work is reportedly near completion, not that it is compliant.", "references": ["NEC Art. 408", "NEC 110.26", "NEC 200.4"]}
